records.question: What template types where the description is Paper have templates with version number exactly 5, effective from 1979-10-20 21:23:20, and effective to on or before 2006-02-06 23:52:04?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_template_types.template_type_code FROM ref_template_types
JOIN templates ON ref_template_types.template_type_code = templates.template_type_code
WHERE templates.date_effective_to <= '2006-02-06 23:52:04' AND templates.version_number = 5 AND templates.date_effective_from = '1979-10-20 21:23:20' AND ref_template_types.template_type_description = 'Paper'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT ref_template_types.Template_Type_Code 
FROM Ref_Template_Types ref_template_types
JOIN Templates templates ON ref_template_types.Template_Type_Code = templates.Template_Type_Code
WHERE ref_template_types.Template_Type_Description = 'Paper' 
AND templates.Version_Number = 5 
AND templates.Date_Effective_From = '1979-10-20 21:23:20' 
AND templates.Date_Effective_To <= '2006-02-06 23:52:04'

AND Templates.Date_Effective_From = '2005-02-20 00:31:34'

records.question: Which template types where the description is Presentation have templates dated exactly on 1975-05-20 22:51:19 with version number at most 2 and effective to date on or before 1992-05-02 20:06:11?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_template_types.template_type_code FROM ref_template_types
JOIN templates ON ref_template_types.template_type_code = templates.template_type_code
WHERE templates.version_number <= 2 AND templates.date_effective_to <= '1992-05-02 20:06:11' AND templates.date_effective_from = '1975-05-20 22:51:19' AND ref_template_types.template_type_description = 'Presentation'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT ref_template_types.Template_Type_Code
FROM Ref_Template_Types ref_template_types
JOIN Templates templates ON ref_template_types.Template_Type_Code = templates.Template_Type_Code
WHERE ref_template_types.Template_Type_Description = 'Presentation'
  AND templates.Date_Effective_From = '1975-05-20 22:51:19'
  AND templates.Version_Number <= 2
  AND templates.Date_Effective_To <= '1992-05-02 20:06:11'
